title: pilea cuneiformis
intro: Pilea cuneiformis, also known as the wedge-leaved pilea or Chinese frog, is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Pilea cuneiformis are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Pilea cuneiformis can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of stress and anxiety.
